author: 毛泽东
title: 反对本本主义 / 没有调查，没有发言权
license_note: Seed excerpt for functional testing; source URL points to Marxists Internet Archive or equivalent public archive. Preserve attribution and verify source/license before redistribution.
risk_note: Mao Zedong texts may have jurisdiction-dependent copyright status; seed uses short excerpts only for testing. Re-crawl and review rights before committing full text.
text:
没有调查，没有发言权。

你对于那个问题不能解决么？那么，你就去调查那个问题的现状和它的历史吧！你完完全全调查明白了，你对那个问题就有解决的办法了。

一切结论产生于调查情况的末尾，而不是在它的先头。

author: 毛泽东
title: 实践论 / 实践、认识、再实践、再认识
license_note: Seed excerpt for functional testing; source URL points to Marxists Internet Archive or equivalent public archive. Preserve attribution and verify source/license before redistribution.
risk_note: Mao Zedong texts may have jurisdiction-dependent copyright status; seed uses short excerpts only for testing. Re-crawl and review rights before committing full text.
text:
通过实践而发现真理，又通过实践而证实真理和发展真理。

从感性认识而能动地发展到理性认识，又从理性认识而能动地指导革命实践，改造主观世界和客观世界。

实践、认识、再实践、再认识，这种形式，循环往复以至无穷。

author: 毛泽东
title: 矛盾论 / 具体地分析具体情况
license_note: Seed excerpt for functional testing; source URL points to Marxists Internet Archive or equivalent public archive. Preserve attribution and verify source/license before redistribution.
risk_note: Mao Zedong texts may have jurisdiction-dependent copyright status; seed uses short excerpts only for testing. Re-crawl and review rights before committing full text.
text:
马克思主义的活的灵魂，就在于具体地分析具体的情况。

不同质的矛盾，只有用不同质的方法才能解决。

研究任何过程，如果是存在着两个以上矛盾的复杂过程的话，就要用全力找出它的主要矛盾。

author: 毛泽东
title: 论持久战 / 战争过程与阶段
license_note: Seed excerpt for functional testing; source URL points to Marxists Internet Archive or equivalent public archive. Preserve attribution and verify source/license before redistribution.
risk_note: Mao Zedong texts may have jurisdiction-dependent copyright status; seed uses short excerpts only for testing. Re-crawl and review rights before committing full text.
text:
战争的伟力之最深厚的根源，存在于民众之中。

抗日战争是持久战，最后胜利是中国的。

保存自己消灭敌人这个战争的目的，就是战争的本质，就是一切战争行动的根据。

author: 毛泽东
title: 为人民服务 / 人固有一死
license_note: Seed excerpt for functional testing; source URL points to Marxists Internet Archive or equivalent public archive. Preserve attribution and verify source/license before redistribution.
risk_note: Mao Zedong texts may have jurisdiction-dependent copyright status; seed uses short excerpts only for testing. Re-crawl and review rights before committing full text.
text:
我们的共产党和共产党所领导的八路军、新四军，是革命的队伍。

我们这个队伍完全是为着解放人民的，是彻底地为人民的利益工作的。

人总是要死的，但死的意义有不同。

author: 毛泽东
title: 改造我们的学习 / 实事求是
license_note: Seed excerpt for functional testing; source URL points to Marxists Internet Archive or equivalent public archive. Preserve attribution and verify source/license before redistribution.
risk_note: Mao Zedong texts may have jurisdiction-dependent copyright status; seed uses short excerpts only for testing. Re-crawl and review rights before committing full text.
text:
实事就是客观存在着的一切事物，是就是客观事物的内部联系，即规律性，求就是我们去研究。

这种态度，有实事求是之意，无哗众取宠之心。

这种态度，就是党性的表现，就是理论和实际统一的马克思列宁主义的作风。

author: 王守仁
title: 传习录 / 知行合一
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
知是行之始，行是知之成。

圣学只一个功夫，知行不可分作两事。

未有知而不行者，知而不行，只是未知。

author: 王守仁
title: 传习录 / 心即理
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
心即理也。天下又有心外之事、心外之理乎？

只此一心，天理具足。

学者须是务实，不要近名。

author: 王守仁
title: 传习录 / 致良知
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
良知只是一个天理自然明觉发见处，只是一个真诚恻怛，便是他本体。

致良知是学问大头脑，是圣人教人第一义。

良知在人心，无间于圣愚，天下古今之所同也。

author: 王守仁
title: 传习录 / 事上磨炼
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
人须在事上磨炼做功夫，乃有益。

若只好静，遇事便乱，终无长进。

静亦定，动亦定，方是真定。

author: 王守仁
title: 传习录 / 四句教
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
无善无恶心之体，有善有恶意之动。

知善知恶是良知，为善去恶是格物。

author: 王守仁
title: 传习录 / 格物
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
格者，正也，正其不正以归于正之谓也。

正其不正者，去恶之谓也；归于正者，为善之谓也。

夫是之谓格物。

author: 曾国藩
title: 曾国藩家书 / 立志
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
士人第一要有志，第二要有识，第三要有恒。

有志则断不甘为下流；有识则知学问无尽，不敢以一得自足；有恒则断无不成之事。

author: 曾国藩
title: 曾国藩家书 / 勤俭
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
家俭则兴，人勤则健。

能勤能俭，永不贫贱。

凡一家之中，勤敬二字能守得几分，未有不兴；若全无一分，未有不败。

author: 曾国藩
title: 曾国藩家书 / 读书
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
读书之法，看、读、写、作四者，每日不可缺一。

读书不二：一书未点完，断不看他书。

东翻西阅，徒徇外为人。

author: 曾国藩
title: 曾国藩家书 / 修身慎独
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
慎独则心安。

自修之道，莫难于养心；养心之难，又在慎独。

能慎独，则内省不疚，可以对天地质鬼神。

author: 曾国藩
title: 曾国藩家书 / 居敬与主一
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
敬字工夫，乃圣门第一义。

无事时，心在腔子里；有事时，专一不杂。

整齐严肃，无时不惧，便是敬。

author: 曾国藩
title: 曾国藩家书 / 戒傲戒惰
license_note: Classical text; seed excerpt from public-domain tradition. Prefer Wikisource or other open textual witnesses for full corpus.
risk_note: Avoid importing modern annotations, translations, or edited editions unless their license is explicit.
text:
天下古今之庸人，皆以一惰字致败。

天下古今之才人，皆以一傲字致败。

戒傲戒惰，保家之道也。
